meta.name: Ophis Unichain AllowList timelock migration (#442, chain 130)
meta.description: Ophis Unichain (chain 130) AllowList timelock migration (#442). Two calls on the GPv2AllowListAuthentication proxy 0x1002E12f2e7f848b20fe572F92133E467a5D010C, in order: (1) setManager(0x4821A534FB11ea4bb2f88d48B13A498A80462e64) = AllowListGuardian, while the Safe still controls it; (2) transferOwnership(0xFC2A6a54122E6D0a598CAe7453DD61263c1065Ed) = TimelockController. End state: manager()==Guardian, owner()==Timelock. addSolver/upgrades become 24h-timelocked; instant removeSolver stays via the Guardian (Safe). Fork-simulated GO. In the Safe UI confirm both txs target 0x1002E12f... before signing 2-of-3.
